schedules.name: IrrigationCycle
schedules._comment: Water once per day for 30 minutes (86400s = 24h, 1800s = 30min)

schedules.name: GrowhouseHeating
schedules._comment: Temperature control check every 5min — requires DHT integration, disabled until configured

schedules.name: NightLighting
schedules._comment: Extend daylight hours — disabled, requires time-based automation

schedules.name: SensorPowerCycle
schedules._comment: Power cycle external sensors every 10min to trigger ADC readings
